meta.title: Launch Edition · 2 for 1 | AmberNord
meta.description: Launch Edition: 2 × The Starter for the price of 1. Limited to 250 spots in Switzerland. In exchange, we ask for an honest review after 14 days.

og.title: Launch Edition · 2 for 1 | AmberNord
og.description: 2 × The Starter for the price of 1. Limited to 250 spots. In exchange: your honest voice.

hero.sub: One bottle lasts 10 days. The second is our commitment to fairness — so you can decide in peace.
hero.fine: Limited to 250 spots · Reviews voluntary · Secure payment via TWINT · Card · G-Pay · Apple Pay

q1.q: Why is the second bottle free?
q1.a: We invest in you instead of in advertising. An honest review is worth more to us than any paid ad.

q2.q: How do I use the concentrate?
q2.a: Daily dose about 25 ml — neat as a shot, with water, in smoothies, juices, salads or tea.

q3.q: Do I have to write a review?
q3.a: No, voluntary. You keep both bottles regardless of whether you write a review.

q4.q: Can I order more than one deal per household?
q4.a: Only one deal per household is allowed so we can ensure diversity among the first 250 spots. For larger families, drop us a note via the contact form — we'll make an exception and ship up to 2× to the same address.
